titleStmt.title: SII 18.143: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 143. (B.K. No. 192 of 1932-33.) KŌṬAVUMACHGI, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Fragment lying in the temple of Sōmēs11vara.

summary.p: This fragmentary inscription, which refers itself to the reign of Bhūlōkamalladēva is broken after the description of the agrahāra town Ummachige and of Padmaṇa and Māhaṇārya, the sons of Jēmaṇa of the Chānura family. Ummachige is stated to be situated in Nareyaṅgal Twelve, a sub-division of Beḷvala.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhā
ya śaṁbhavē . svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājā
dhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭāraka satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyā
bharaṇaṁ śrīmatu bhūlōkamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarō
ttarābhivriddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁ saluttamire .
© dhareyoḷu beḷvalamadaṟoḷnareyaṁgalpaṁnera baḷiyo
ḷu dharege toḍavadagrahārābharaṇamadummacige sogayi
kuṁ vasumatiyoḷu . sarasijasambhavānvayadoḷoppuva cā
nuravaṁśadoḷu mahēśvarapadapaṁkajabhramaranudghayaśaṁ
jitavairi tatkuḷāṁburuha jēmaṇanātana sūnu
dharmmatatuparanabhimānamūrtti sujanāgraṇi padmaṇaniṣṭapōṣaṇaṁ
ka [.] Ātana sahajātaṁ vikhyātayaśaṁ vibudhavanajīvanakaḷahaṁsaṁ nīti
brihaspati guṇanidhi bhūtaḷadoḷu māhaṇāryyanacaḷitadhai[ryyaṁ .]
vimātamama dharātaḷa sida nirjjatōgrāṁ
kēruha rupamāna The continuation is broken off.
Digital edition of SII 18.143 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
